terms.PMS: Portfolio Management Service — SEBI-regulated, min ₹50L investment, individual stock portfolio
terms.AIF: Alternative Investment Fund — SEBI-regulated, min ₹1Cr, categories I/II/III
terms.NAV: Net Asset Value — per-unit value of a fund
terms.CAGR: Compound Annual Growth Rate — annualized return
terms.Sharpe Ratio: Risk-adjusted return measure — higher is better, >1.0 is good
terms.Sortino Ratio: Like Sharpe but only penalizes downside volatility
terms.Max Drawdown: Largest peak-to-trough decline — measures worst-case loss
terms.Alpha: Excess return over benchmark — fund manager's value-add
terms.FII: Foreign Institutional Investors — global funds investing in India
terms.DII: Domestic Institutional Investors — Indian MFs, insurance, pension funds
terms.VIX: Volatility Index — measures market fear. <14 = calm, >25 = high fear
terms.PE Ratio: Price-to-Earnings — valuation metric. Nifty historical avg ~20.5
terms.LTCG: Long Term Capital Gains — equity held >12 months, taxed at 12.5%
terms.STCG: Short Term Capital Gains — equity held <12 months, taxed at 20%
terms.SIP: Systematic Investment Plan — regular monthly investment
terms.STP: Systematic Transfer Plan — gradual transfer from liquid to equity
terms.HNI: High Net Worth Individual — typically ₹5Cr+ investable wealth
terms.UHNI: Ultra High Net Worth Individual — ₹25Cr+ investable wealth
terms.NRI: Non-Resident Indian — specific tax and regulatory considerations
